name: NinjaOne (NinjaRMM)
description: Monitor and manage endpoint devices, security patches, antivirus status, and alerts from your NinjaOne RMM platform

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth2 Client ID from NinjaOne Administration > Apps

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth2 Client Secret from NinjaOne Administration > Apps

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: Global: app.ninjarmm.com | Europe: eu.ninjarmm.com | Oceania: oc.ninjarmm.com

checks.name: Device Security Status
checks.description: Verify that all managed devices have up-to-date antivirus and are properly secured

checks.name: Active Security Alerts
checks.description: Monitor for active security alerts and critical system conditions requiring immediate attention

checks.name: Patch Management Status
checks.description: Ensure all devices are up-to-date with critical security patches and operating system updates
